product_overview: Noah is a SaaS B2B platform for church management that provides user registration, authentication, account management and admin user administration through a Next.js + MUI frontend with Prisma-backed persistence.
core_goals: Provide secure user registration and authentication (email/password + Google) with hashed passwords and active-user checks.
Allow users to view and edit personal and contact information and securely change their password.
Enable administrators to list, view, edit, and deactivate users with searchable, filterable tables and detailed user views.
Offer clear, role-aware navigation and access control across dashboard and admin sections.
Keep server-side mutations secure using Server Actions / API routes and follow the project's SoC architecture.

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Multi-step registration wizard (4 steps) that collects personal, family, contact/location and account credentials; creates the user with a hashed password and auto-logs them in on success.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill firstName and lastName fields -> Select documentType from dropdown -> Fill documentNumber field -> Select gender via radio buttons -> Select birthDate from date input -> Click Siguiente to go to step 2 -> Select maritalStatus from dropdown -> Toggle hasChildren switch -> Fill childrenCount if hasChildren is true -> Click Siguiente to go to step 3 -> Fill phone field -> Select country from dropdown -> Fill city, address, neighborhood fields -> Click Siguiente to go to step 4 -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Fill confirmPassword field -> Check agreeTerms checkbox -> Click Registrarse button to submit -> Auto-redirect to /dashboards on success

Navigate to /register -> Fill firstName and lastName fields -> Select documentType from dropdown -> Fill documentNumber field -> Select gender via radio buttons -> Select birthDate from date input -> Click Siguiente to go to step 2 -> Select maritalStatus from dropdown -> Toggle hasChildren switch -> Fill childrenCount if hasChildren is true -> Click Siguiente to go to step 3 -> Fill phone field -> Select country from dropdown -> Fill city, address, neighborhood fields -> Click Siguiente to go to step 4 -> Fill email field with existing email -> Fill password field -> Fill confirmPassword field -> Check agreeTerms checkbox -> Click Registrarse button to submit -> See error message if email already exists

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate users with email/password credentials (bcrypt verification) and Google OAuth; checks that user is active before granting access.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Iniciar Sesion button to submit -> Redirect to /dashboards on success
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field with invalid email or wrong password -> Fill password input field -> Click Iniciar Sesion button to submit -> See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Account Settings - Profile
features.description: View and update personal profile information including personal data, family info and contact/location details from the account settings page.
user_flows: Navigate to /account-settings -> View current profile data loaded from database -> Edit firstName and lastName fields -> Edit phone field -> Select documentType from dropdown -> Edit documentNumber -> Select gender via radio buttons -> Edit birthDate -> Select maritalStatus -> Toggle hasChildren switch -> Select country and edit city, address, neighborhood -> Click Guardar Cambios button -> See success alert on save

Navigate to /account-settings -> View current profile data loaded from database -> Edit firstName and lastName fields -> Click Guardar Cambios button -> See validation or save error alert if save fails

features.name: Account Settings - Change Password
features.description: Change the account password by submitting current password and new password with confirmation; validates current password before updating.
user_flows: Navigate to /account-settings -> Click Seguridad tab -> Fill current password field -> Fill new password field -> Fill confirm new password field -> Click Cambiar Contrasena button -> See success alert on password change

Navigate to /account-settings -> Click Seguridad tab -> Fill current password field with wrong password -> Fill new password field -> Fill confirm new password field -> Click Cambiar Contrasena button -> See error if current password is wrong

features.name: Admin User List
features.description: Admin-only user list page with table, search, role/status filters, pagination and an edit drawer for updating role and active status.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/usuarios -> View table of all users with name, email, phone, role chip, status chip, city -> Type in search field to filter users -> Select Rol filter dropdown -> Select Estado filter dropdown -> Click edit icon to open edit drawer -> Change role in edit drawer -> Change active status in edit drawer -> Click Guardar button in drawer -> See updated user in table
Navigate to /admin/usuarios as non-admin -> See access denied or no access to admin section

features.name: Admin User View
features.description: Admin-only detailed user view with left panel showing avatar and key info and right-side tabs for personal information and location; supports deactivation.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/usuarios/[id] -> View user avatar and basic info in left panel -> See role and status chips -> Switch to Informacion Personal tab -> View personal details (name, document, gender, birth date, marital status, children) -> Switch to Ubicacion tab -> View location details (country, city, address, neighborhood) -> Click Desactivar button to deactivate user -> See success status update
Navigate to /admin/usuarios/[id] as non-admin -> See access denied

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Sidebar and user dropdown navigation that routes users to dashboard, account settings and admin user management (admin only), and supports logout.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboards -> Click Inicio in sidebar to go to /dashboards -> Click Mi Cuenta in sidebar to go to /account-settings -> Click user avatar to open dropdown -> Click Mi Cuenta in dropdown -> Click Cerrar Sesion to logout
Navigate to /dashboards as non-admin -> Open sidebar -> Do not see Usuarios link in admin section -> Attempting to access /admin/usuarios directly -> See access denied

routes.description: User login page with email/password and Google OAuth
User account settings with profile and security tabs
Admin user list with table, filters, and edit drawer (admin only)
Admin user detail view with info tabs and deactivate (admin only)

Click Desactivar button to deactivate user
Click Volver button to go back
Switch between Informacion Personal and Ubicacion tabs
View personal details (name, document, gender, birth date, marital status, children)
View location details (country, city, address, neighborhood)

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Sidebar navigation with Inicio, Mi Cuenta, and admin section with Usuarios. User dropdown with Mi Cuenta link and admin-only Usuarios link.
user_interactions: Click Inicio in sidebar to go to dashboard
Click Mi Cuenta in sidebar to go to account settings
Click Usuarios in sidebar admin section to go to user list
Click user avatar to open dropdown
See Admin chip if user is admin
